somali.the_earliest_known_brick_wall_dates_to: Derbiga lebenka ah ee ugu da'da weyn ee la yaqaan wuxuu taariikhdiisu tahay ~7500 KH Yerixoo!
somali.the_leaning_tower_of_pisa_has_a_3_97_l: Munaarada Pisa ee janjeera waxay leedahay janjeer 3.97° aasaaska gaaban awgeed!
somali.the_parthenon_used_marble_limestone_an: Parthenon waxay isticmaashay marmar, dhagax nuurad, iyo birta xajinta!
somali.the_colosseum_has_80_arched_entrances: Colosseum wuxuu leeyahay 80 albaab oo qaansoolan!
somali.the_taj_mahal_is_perfectly_symmetrical: Taj Mahal waa si fiican isku eg dhinaca dhexe.
somali.4_wide_3_high_no_floaters: 4+ ballac, 3+ dheer, ma jiraan walxo sabaynaya
somali.the_1915_anakkale_bridge_spans_2_023_m: Buundada Çanakkale ee 1915 waxay gaadhaa 2,023 mitir!
somali.igloos_use_dome_shapes_to_minimize_hea: Igloos waxay isticmaalaan qaababka qubbada si loo yareeyo luminta kulaylka!
somali.the_burj_khalifa_828m_uses_a_y_shaped_: Burj Khalifa (828m) wuxuu isticmaalaa qorshe dabaq oo qaab Y leh!
somali.the_great_pyramid_contains_2_3_million: Ahramka Weyn wuxuu ka kooban yahay 2.3 milyan oo xajar dhagax ah!
somali.architects_balance_light_ventilation_i: Naqshadeeyayaasha waxay dheellitiraan iftiinka, hawada, dhammaystirnaanta, iyo quruxda!
somali.use_all_12_shape_types_in_one_build: Isticmaal dhammaan 12 nooc oo qaab ah dhisme keliya
somali.build_stable_70_with_exactly_5_blocks: Dhis mid deggan (70%+) oo leh 5 xajar oo sax ah
somali.architecture_studio_keyboard_shortcuts: Istuudiyaha Naqshadaynta Dhismaha. Gaagaaban kibooradka: P Dhig, E Tirtir, A Rinji mari, R Wareeji.
somali.paste_share_code_to_import_a_design: Dhaji koodhka wadaagga si aad u soo dejiso naqshad
somali.interactive_architecture_studio_3d_vis: Muuqaal 3D oo isdhexgal ah oo istuudiyaha naqshadaynta dhismaha
somali.low_effective_stress_structure_tolerat: Cadaadis hoose oo wax ku ool ah. Qaab-dhismeedka wuxuu u dulqaadaa xaalado daran.
somali.within_design_margins_survives_normal_: Gudaha xudduudaha naqshadda. Wuxuu ka badbaadaa culeyska caadiga ah.
somali.approaching_failure_threshold_marginal: Wuxuu ku soo dhowaanayaa xadka guuldarada. Xuddun hoosta cadaadiska.
somali.likely_collapse_under_load: Suuragal in uu dumo culeyska hoostiisa.
somali.hypothesis_when_does_rigidity_rescue_a: Mala-awaal: Goorma ayaa adkaantu badbaadisaa qaab-dhismeed culeys badan?
somali.explain_how_gravity_rigidity_and_mass_: Sharax sida cufisjiidka, adkaanta, iyo cufka ay isugu dhexgalaan si loo go'aamiyo xasiloonida.

lingala.the_earliest_known_brick_wall_dates_to: Efelo ya briki ya kala koleka oyo eyebani ezali ya ~7500 LY na Jeriko!
lingala.the_leaning_tower_of_pisa_has_a_3_97_l: Tour ya Pisa oyo egumbami ezali na kogumbama ya 3.97° mpo na miboko ya mozindo te!
lingala.the_parthenon_used_marble_limestone_an: Parthenon esalelaki marbre, libanga ya calcaire, mpe baclamps ya ebende!
lingala.the_colosseum_has_80_arched_entrances: Colosseum ezali na bizibeli 80 ya arc!
lingala.the_taj_mahal_is_perfectly_symmetrical: Taj Mahal ezali na bokokani ya kokoka na nzela ya axe ya katikati.
lingala.4_wide_3_high_no_floaters: 4+ monene, 3+ molai, biloko ezali kobeba te
lingala.the_1915_anakkale_bridge_spans_2_023_m: Pont ya Çanakkale ya 1915 ezali na molai ya mètres 2,023!
lingala.igloos_use_dome_shapes_to_minimize_hea: Igloos basalelaka bilamba ya dôme mpo na kokitisa kobungisa molunge!
lingala.the_burj_khalifa_828m_uses_a_y_shaped_: Burj Khalifa (828m) esalelaka plan ya etage ya elilingi Y!
lingala.pyramid_ramp_shapes_stability_90: Bilamba ya piramide/nzela ya kokita, makasi > 90%
lingala.the_great_pyramid_contains_2_3_million: Piramide Monene ezali na biteni ya mabanga milio 2.3!
lingala.architects_balance_light_ventilation_i: Ba-architectes bakokanisaka pole, mopepe, bosembo, mpe kitoko!
lingala.place_your_very_first_block: Tia eteni na yo ya liboso
lingala.have_100_blocks_in_one_build: Zalá na biteni 100+ na botongi moko
lingala.use_all_12_shape_types_in_one_build: Salelá bilamba nyonso 12 na botongi moko
lingala.use_all_6_materials_in_one_build: Salelá biloko nyonso 6 na botongi moko
lingala.survive_intensity_10_earthquake: Bika na koningana ya mabele ya makasi 10
lingala.build_stable_70_with_exactly_5_blocks: Tonga oyo ya makasi (70%+) na biteni 5 mpenza
lingala.architecture_studio_keyboard_shortcuts: Studio ya Architecture. Banzela mokuse ya clavier: P Tia, E Longola, A Pakola langi, R Baluka.
lingala.apply_gravity_drop_floating_blocks: Salelá nguya ya kobenda (kitisa biteni oyo ezali kobeba)
lingala.paste_share_code_to_import_a_design: Kotia code ya kokabola mpo na kokɔtisa design
lingala.interactive_architecture_studio_3d_vis: Vizualisation 3D ya interactif ya studio ya architecture
lingala.low_effective_stress_structure_tolerat: Pression ya malamu ya moke. Estruktire eyikaka mikakatano ya makasi.
lingala.within_design_margins_survives_normal_: Na kati ya bandelo ya design. Ebikaka mikumba ya momesano.
lingala.approaching_failure_threshold_marginal: Ezali kopusana na ndelo ya kokweya. Pene-pene na nse ya pression.
lingala.likely_collapse_under_load: Ekoki kokweya na nse ya mokumba.
lingala.hypothesis_when_does_rigidity_rescue_a: Hypothèse: Tango nini makasi ebikisaka estruktire oyo eleki na mokumba?
lingala.explain_how_gravity_rigidity_and_mass_: Limbolá ndenge nguya ya kobenda, makasi, mpe kilo esalaka mpo na koyeba makasi.

kinyarwanda.the_earliest_known_brick_wall_dates_to: Urukuta rw'amatafari rwa kera cyane ruzwi rwabayeho ~7500 MIY i Yeriko!
kinyarwanda.the_leaning_tower_of_pisa_has_a_3_97_l: Umunara wa Pisa wunamye ufite kunama 3.97° kubera urufatiro rudacukuye!
kinyarwanda.the_parthenon_used_marble_limestone_an: Parthenon yakoresheje marubure, ibuye rya shokora, n'imihamo y'icyuma!
kinyarwanda.the_taj_mahal_is_perfectly_symmetrical: Taj Mahal ihwanye neza ku rugero rwo hagati.
kinyarwanda.the_1915_anakkale_bridge_spans_2_023_m: Ikiraro cya Çanakkale cyo mu 1915 kigera kuri metero 2,023!
kinyarwanda.igloos_use_dome_shapes_to_minimize_hea: Igloos zikoresha imiterere y'igicumbi kugira ngo zigabanye gutakaza ubushyuhe!
kinyarwanda.the_burj_khalifa_828m_uses_a_y_shaped_: Burj Khalifa (828m) ikoresha gahunda y'igorofa imeze nka Y!
kinyarwanda.the_great_pyramid_contains_2_3_million: Piramide Nkuru irimo ibice by'amabuye miliyoni 2.3!
kinyarwanda.architects_balance_light_ventilation_i: Abubatsi banganya urumuri, umwuka, ubudahungabana, n'ubwiza!
kinyarwanda.use_all_12_shape_types_in_one_build: Koresha imiterere yose 12 mu nyubako imwe
kinyarwanda.use_all_6_materials_in_one_build: Koresha ibikoresho byose 6 mu nyubako imwe
kinyarwanda.architecture_studio_keyboard_shortcuts: Studio yo Kubaka. Inzira ngufi za klaviye: P Shyira, E Siba, A Saka irangi, R Zunguruka.
kinyarwanda.paste_share_code_to_import_a_design: Komeka kode yo gusangira kugira ngo winjize igishushanyo
kinyarwanda.interactive_architecture_studio_3d_vis: Igaragaza rya 3D rikorana rya studio yo kubaka
kinyarwanda.low_effective_stress_structure_tolerat: Umuvuduko mucye ufite akamaro. Inyubako ihangana n'ibihe bikomeye.
kinyarwanda.within_design_margins_survives_normal_: Mu mbibi z'igishushanyo. Irokoka imitwaro isanzwe.
kinyarwanda.approaching_failure_threshold_marginal: Yegera urugero rwo kunanirwa. Ku mpera munsi y'umuvuduko.
kinyarwanda.hypothesis_when_does_rigidity_rescue_a: Igitekerezo: Ni ryari ubukana bukiza inyubako ifite umutwaro urenze?
kinyarwanda.explain_how_gravity_rigidity_and_mass_: Sobanura uburyo rukuruzi, ubukana, n'ubwinshi bikorana kugira ngo bigene guhama.
